description:
🕒 10:00–14:30

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-morimana-metsa-kontyu/

Observe insects in their natural setting and learn about insect anatomy, ecology, and plant-animal interactions while making specimens — including invasive species and specimens showing adaptations to danger. Join this tour and become a bug expert to make your summer break even more fun!

【Fee】
Adults ¥5,000 / Students ¥4,000 / Preschool children ¥2,500
(includes guide, insurance, materials)

【Capacity】15 people

【Guide】Mori no Field Gakusha (Forest Field Learning Institute) staff

【What to bring】Drinks, lunch, work gloves, writing materials, rain gear, insect repellent spray

【More info】Forest Field Learning Institute website: https://morinomanabiya168.wixsite.com/website
location: 集合 メッツァビレッジ インフォメーション前（イーグルバス他「メッツァ」下車徒歩3分）
summary: Summer break project: insect specimen-making at Metsä Village
